assembly_context.name: 4Axis_RobotArm_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 一个包含底座、3个活动关节臂（Link1-3）及集成夹爪的4轴机械臂装配体。底座为长方体带顶部旋转轴；连杆由中间圆柱和两端方块组成，通过侧面销孔配合连接；最上方连杆集成V型夹爪。所有尺寸单位为mm。

global_coordinate_system.x_direction: Forward (aligned with Link1 initial extension direction)
global_coordinate_system.y_direction: Right hand rule relative to X and Z

design_rules: All dimensions in mm, convert to meters for modeling code.
Use nominal dimensions for part modeling; assembly constraints handle fit/clearance.
Links rotate around their respective joint axes.
assembly_sequence: Insert Base and fix to GROUND.
Insert Link1. Constrain bottom_hole_axis to Base.main_axis_z (concentric). Constrain Link1.bottom_face_block to Base.top_face_main (coincident/offset).
Insert Link2. Constrain Link2.bottom_hole_axis to Link1.top_pin_axis (concentric). Constrain Link2.bottom_side_face to Link1.top_block_side_face (coincident).
Insert Link3_Gripper. Constrain Link3.bottom_hole_axis to Link2.top_pin_axis (concentric). Constrain Link3.bottom_side_face to Link2.top_block_side_face (coincident).

part.name: Link1
part.function: First rotating arm segment connecting Base to Link2.
part.shape: Central cylinder D50xL150. Two end blocks 60x60x20 attached to cylinder ends. Bottom block has central hole D50. Top block has side pin D10xL20 extending along local Y axis.
key_dimensions: Top Pin: D10, Length 20, Offset from center
part.material_or_notes: Default material. Local Z along cylinder length.

faces.name: bottom_face_block
faces.purpose: Mating face with Base top boss

axes.name: bottom_hole_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local Z, centered in bottom block

axes.name: top_pin_axis
axes.direction_relation: along local Y, centered in top block side face

assembly_relation_notes: Bottom hole axis coincident with Base main_axis_z.
Bottom face of bottom block coincident with top face of Base boss (or offset by small clearance if needed, here assumed flush for nominal).
Top pin axis will mate with Link2 bottom hole.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Create sketch on XY plane: Circle D50 centered.
Extrude symmetrically or one-way to total length 150mm (e.g., -75 to +75). Let's define local Z as length.
Actually, easier: Sketch on XZ plane? No, standard is XY for cross section. Extrude along Z.
Sketch on XY: Circle D50. Extrude along Z from 0 to 150.
At Z=0 (bottom), create sketch on XY: Square 60x60 centered. Extrude down -20 (or up depending on orientation). Let's say Block is at Z=-20 to 0. So Extrude Cut or Add? Add block below.
Refined: Cylinder Z=0 to 150. Bottom Block Z=-20 to 0. Top Block Z=150 to 170.
Bottom Block: Sketch on XY at Z=0, Square 60x60. Extrude down 20mm.
Top Block: Sketch on XY at Z=150, Square 60x60. Extrude up 20mm.
Bottom Hole: On bottom face of Bottom Block (Z=-20), sketch Circle D50 centered. Extrude cut up 20mm (through block).
Top Pin: On side face of Top Block (e.g., Y+ face at Y=30), sketch Circle D10 centered vertically (Z=160) and horizontally. Extrude out 20mm along +Y.
Apply C2 chamfer to all sharp edges of blocks.
